title: Tunisian Frittata
description: A twist on the classic frittata, inspired by the flavors of Tunisia. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat and add the malty, dense, and tunisian.
Pour the whisked eggs over the vegetables and cook until the edges start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to loosen the edges of the frittata from the skillet.
Slide the frittata out of the skillet onto a plate and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
